memoryArtifacts.description: Crest of name Calder, Kaledeour. With noble French duck or swan design. Mandella Calder
Coat of arms of Charteris, Charteries. With French noble white swan symbol. Similar view of white swan as in Calder crest,
Wedding coat of arms of Charteris and Wemyss. Noble red lion symbol of Earls of Wemyss and March.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse於1317年出生在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南時，她的父親Sir Robert de Brus55歲，母親Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart37歲。她於大約1340年與Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1355年3月2日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利享年38歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse于1317年出生在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Brus55岁，母亲Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart37岁。她于大约1340年与Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1355年3月2日在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利享年38岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南。

nameMeanings.name: Charteris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: from the city of Chartres in N France; see Charters .

variants.name: Charters
meanings: Scottish (Kirkcudbrightshire) and northern English: habitational name of Norman origin from the French city of Chartres, named for a Gaulish tribe, recorded in Latin sources as the Carnutes, whose seat it was.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Stenhouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name principally from the barony of Stenhouse in Larbert (Stirlingshire), but perhaps also from places so named in Midlothian and Dumfriesshire. Compare   Stonehouse  .

variants.name: Stonehouse
meanings: English: from Middle English ston, stan ‘stone’ (Old English stān) + hous(e) ‘house’ (Old English hūs). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a stone house (something of a rarity in the Middle Ages), or habitational, from a place so named, such as Stonehouse (Devon, Gloucestershire, Northumberland). The principal source of the surname is perhaps Stonehouse Cote in Bilsdale (North Yorkshire). Compare Stenhouse .
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic) Steinhaus ‘stone house’, a topographic name for someone who lived in or by such a house.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse was born in 1317, in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Robert de Brus, was 55 and her mother, Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart, was 37. She married Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan about 1340, in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 2 March 1355, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 38, and was buried in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse est née en 1317, à Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert de Brus, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan environ 1340, à Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 mars 1355, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse 1317 in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Brus 55 und ihre Mutter Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart 37. Sie hat um 1340 in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 2. März 1355 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse è nata il nel 1317 nel Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Robert de Brus, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan circa 1340, nel Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 marzo 1355, nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouseが1317年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアクラクマナンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Brusは55歳，母Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewartは37歳であった。約1340年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアクラクマナンでThomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1355年3月2日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで38歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアクラクマナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse(이)가 1317년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 클랙먼아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Brus(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1340년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 클랙먼아에서 Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 3월 2일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 클랙먼아실르 클랙먼아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse nasceu em 1317, em Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert de Brus, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan aproximadamente 1340, em Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 2 de março de 1355, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse родилась в 1317 г. в местности клаккманнан, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Brus было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan около 1340 г. в местности клаккманнан, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 2 марта 1355 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности клаккманнан, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjorie Charteris of Stenhouse nació en 1317, en Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert de Brus, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Margaret Jane Duchess de Stewart, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Thomas Bruce 1st Baron of Clackmannan aproximadamente 1340, en Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1355, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
